name: tax-info
title: Taxpayer Information (W-9 style)
description: Basic taxpayer identification details, W-9 style. Identity fields can be filled from a resume; tax identifiers must be provided by the person.

fields.label: Full Name
fields.description: Name as shown on your income tax return

fields.label: Federal Tax Classification
fields.description: e.g. Individual/sole proprietor, C corporation, S corporation, Partnership

fields.label: SSN or EIN
fields.description: Social Security Number or Employer Identification Number
